transcript.narrator_intro: Listen to a conversation between a man and a woman.

dialogue.speaker: M1
dialogue.text: Have you renewed your campus parking permit yet?

dialogue.speaker: F1
dialogue.text: Not yet. The parking office doesn't open until nine this morning.

transcript.question_intro: Why hasn't the woman renewed her parking permit?

questions.prompt: Why hasn't the woman renewed her parking permit?

choices.text: She no longer has a car.
The parking office is not open yet.

questions.explanation: She says the parking office has not opened yet.
questions.evidence: The parking office doesn't open until nine this morning.
